fields.label: Detector ID
fields.description: Registry id of the Access-Log detector these aggregates belong to (e.g. sell-customer-print-format).

fields.label: Snapshot Key
fields.description: Deterministic hash of (detector_id, period, company); the unique index makes the monthly upsert race-safe (mirrors Jarvis Learned Pattern.pattern_key).

fields.label: Rows Ingested
fields.description: Log rows folded into this month's aggregates so far.

fields.label: Payload
fields.description: Monthly aggregate JSON (for print-format: nested party -> print format -> {n, eff, days} counts). Aggregates only; never raw log rows.
